narrative:
Saltcreek township has 1,018 registered voters, with 63.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 1.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.3 percentage points.
